evals.prompt: Create a FilterPanel component with a text filter for 'username' (using contains operator), a number filter for 'age' (using gt operator), and a select filter for 'status' with options for 'active' and 'inactive'. Use the FilterPanel, useFilterState hook, TextFilter, NumberFilter, and SelectFilter from @ahoo-wang/fetcher-viewer.
evals.expected_output: A React component with a dynamic FilterPanel that allows adding, removing, and updating three filters: text (username contains), number (age >), and select (status equals). The filters should be managed via useFilterState hook.
expectations: Uses useFilterState hook to manage filter state
FilterPanel renders with all three filter types

evals.prompt: Create a data table columns definition for a user list with the following columns: name (TextCell with ellipsis), status (TagCell with blue color), account balance (CurrencyCell in USD format), created date (DateTimeCell with YYYY-MM-DD format), and an Edit action (ActionCell). The table should use Ant Design Table component.
evals.expected_output: A columns configuration array for Ant Design Table using fetcher-viewer cell components to render each column type appropriately.
expectations: Uses TextCell with ellipsis attribute for name column
Uses TagCell with color attribute for status column
Uses CurrencyCell with USD format for balance column
Uses DateTimeCell with YYYY-MM-DD format for date column
Uses ActionCell with onClick handler for Edit action
Columns array is properly structured for Ant Design Table

evals.prompt: Create a RemoteSelect component for searching users with a 300ms debounce. The component should fetch from /api/users/search endpoint and display results. Also create a TagInput component for entering multiple tags with string serialization.
evals.expected_output: Two form components: RemoteSelect for debounced user search and TagInput for multi-tag string input.
expectations: Uses RemoteSelect component with search function
RemoteSelect has debounce configured with 300ms delay
Uses TagInput component for tag input
TagInput uses string serialization for tag values
